# komodo_stack_run_service (Action)

Runs a one-time command against a service using `docker compose run`.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the stack.
- `service` (String) Service to run.

### Optional

- `command` (List of String) Command and args to pass to the service container.
- `detach` (Boolean) Detach container on run.
- `entrypoint` (String) Override the default entrypoint.
- `env` (Map of String) Extra environment variables for the run.
- `no_deps` (Boolean) Do not start linked services.
- `no_tty` (Boolean) Do not allocate TTY.
- `pull` (Boolean) Pull the image before running.
- `service_ports` (Boolean) Map service ports to the host.
- `user` (String) User to run as inside the container.
- `workdir` (String) Working directory inside the container.
